overview: TLC Family Health & Hormone provides integrative functional medicine with a focus on bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) customized to individual patient needs. The practice offers hormone therapy, IV hydration, and acute/chronic care for patients ages 2 and up.
highlights: Customized BHRT with multiple delivery methods (oral, topical, subcutaneous)
100% customizable IV hydration therapy with vitamins and nutrients
Women's health, thyroid, and mental health services
targetAudience: Individuals of all ages in the Tullahoma area seeking integrative functional medicine and hormone optimization.
